differential_diagnoses: Primary pleural lymphoma (or pulmonary involvement of lymphoma)
Plasma cell dyscrasia (e.g., myeloma or plasmacytoma)
next_steps: Flow cytometry of pleural fluid for immunophenotyping
Cytologic analysis and cell block preparation of pleural fluid
Contrast-enhanced CT scan of the chest, abdomen, and pelvis
Pleural biopsy (if thoracentesis findings remain nondiagnostic)
Pleural fluid cultures (aerobic, anaerobic, fungal, and mycobacterial)
Serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation
Bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage and transbronchial biopsy

differential_diagnoses: Primary pleural lymphoma or pulmonary lymphoma
next_steps: Cytologic analysis and cell block preparation of pleural fluid with immunohistochemical staining
Contrast-enhanced CT scan of the chest, abdomen, and pelvis
Pleural fluid analysis for adenosine deaminase (ADA) and mycobacterial cultures
Serum and urine protein electrophoresis with immunofixation and serum free light chain assay
Bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage and biopsy of suspicious areas
